/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/gnarly2_VST3.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/gnarly2_VST3.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/gnarly2_VST3.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -D_WIN32_WINNT=0x0A00      -DWINVER=0x0A00      -DNOMINMAX      -DWIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN      -Wno-error=cast-function-type -O3 -DNDEBUG -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -shared -o gnarly2_artefacts/Release/VST3/Gnarly2.vst3/Contents/x86_64-win/Gnarly2.vst3 -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/gnarly2_VST3.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/gnarly2_VST3.dir/linkLibs.rsp
